cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this question. The question is about what we can infer from the headline "Safina goes from basket case to top of the world." The options are A, B, C, D. First, I need to understand what each part of the headline means. "Basket case" is a phrase I know, which usually means someone who is very nervous, unstable, or in a bad emotional state. "Top of the world" here probably means being the best in her field, which is tennis for Safina. So the headline is saying that Dinara Safina transformed from being a basket case (nervous, maybe unstable emotionally) to becoming the top of the world (world number one in tennis).
